title: RoutePlan
description: A selected/split route across venue legs (SPEC §4.4). Cross-field invariants (conservation, worstCaseReceive >= minReceive, slippage bound, maxVenues/allowList) are enforced by the constraint predicates in @synfin/spec, not by this shape alone.

legs.description: The legs. Σ legs[].give.amount MUST equal intent.give.amount (SPEC §4.4).

worstCaseReceive.description: Lower bound on delivered output given quote firmness/slippage. A plan whose worstCaseReceive < intent.want.minReceive MUST NOT be submitted (SPEC §4.4, §6).

slippageBps.description: Slippage vs reference, in basis points; MUST satisfy intent.maxSlippageBps (SPEC §4.4).
